节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Sets the interval for repeatedly calling a function.
注释信息: @param { Function } handler - Indicates the function to be called repeatedly at the interval.
@param { number } delay - Indicates the interval between each two calls, in milliseconds. The function will be called after this delay.
@param { any[] } arguments - Indicates additional arguments to pass to "handler" when the timer goes off.

parameters.说明: Indicates the function to be called repeatedly at the interval.
Indicates the interval between each two calls, in milliseconds. The function will be called after this delay.
Indicates additional arguments to pass to "handler" when the timer goes off.

节点.功能描述: Sets a timer after which a function will be executed. If this parameter is left empty, default value "0" will be used, which means that the function will be called immediately or as soon as possible.
注释信息: @param { Function } handler - Indicates the function to be called after the timer goes off.
@param { number } [delay] - Indicates the delay (in milliseconds) after which the function will be called.
@param { any[] } arguments - Indicates additional arguments to pass to "handler" when the timer goes off.

parameters.说明: Indicates the function to be called after the timer goes off.
number } [delay] - Indicates the delay (in milliseconds) after which the function will be called.
Indicates additional arguments to pass to "handler" when the timer goes off.

节点.功能描述: Cancels the interval set by " setInterval()".
注释信息: @param { number } [intervalID] - Indicates the timer ID returned by "setInterval()".

parameters.说明: number } [intervalID] - Indicates the timer ID returned by "setInterval()".

节点.功能描述: Cancels the timer set by " setTimeout()".
注释信息: @param { number } [timeoutID] - Indicates the timer ID returned by "setTimeout()".

parameters.说明: number } [timeoutID] - Indicates the timer ID returned by "setTimeout()".

节点.功能描述: Get the java interface instance. The java instance needs to register, otherwise it cannot be obtained. After obtaining the instance, you can call the function with the same name on the Java side. The reject callback returns the object containing code and error data.
注释信息: @param { string } [name] - Java interface name, including package path, such as com.example.test.timeinterfaceimpl.
@returns { any } A promise object is returned. The resolve callback is the object of PA.

parameters.说明: string } [name] - Java interface name, including package path, such as com.example.test.timeinterfaceimpl.

节点.return_description: A promise object is returned. The resolve callback is the object of PA.

节点.功能描述: Obtain the objects exposed in app.js
